items.raw_desc: Derékalj NILS Camp NC4060 modrá samonafukovací dvouosobová karimatka:The NILS Camp NC4060 self-inflating car mattress ensures quality sleep during camping and camping holidays. But the mat is also suitable for the water and wherever you want to lie down comfortably. Self-inflation is ensured by an internal, open-pore foam material. When the valve is released, it draws air into itself and returns to its original state. Finally, the pad still needs to be inflated to the desired hardness. Folding is done by opening the valve and rolling up from the opposite side to the valve. Then secure the mattress with the straps and buckles and place it in the supplied bag. For the model was used very durable polyester 190T coated with a layer of PVC, this combination provides high durability and the mattress can be placed even on uneven surfaces. The edges of the mattress are equipped with buttons that allow you to combine several mattresses into one large area, which is suitable for example for filling the floor in a tent. The cushion is not removable and unlike a car mattress it is not...
